title: magnolia purpurea var. liliiflora
intro: Magnolia purpurea var. liliiflora, also known as the Purple Magnolia or Lily Magnolia, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, characterized by its stunning purple flowers and fragrant, yellow-green leaves. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Magnolia purpurea var. liliiflora include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. Magnolia purpurea var. liliiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to treat various ailments.
